title: Join Me for a Free Webinar with Get Messy!
excerpt: Join me in sharing your story 💓 So excited to be the guest artist for Get Messy Art Journal's season of Story . Although the season has already started, you can join and get monthly access. I’ll also be doing…
body: Join me in sharing your story 💓 So excited to be the guest artist for Get Messy Art Journal's season of Story. Although the season has already started, you can join and get monthly access. I’ll also be doing a FREE live webinar (available to everyone!) on June 20 at 4pm PST so be sure to sign up here for the fun!
